approach: Analyze tool naming conventions in frontmatter vs body references to identify inconsistencies and propose standardized tool identifiers
risks: Changing tool identifiers could break existing workflows if tools expect specific formats
Inconsistent tool naming between files could cause confusion in tool selection logic
Some tools may have different naming conventions across MCP servers

conventions_observed.observation: Tools in frontmatter use double underscore notation (mcp__context7__resolve-library-id) consistent with MCP server naming convention
Same tool naming convention as scout file - consistent double underscore format
Tools in frontmatter use double underscore notation, but body references use hyphen notation (mcp-aptu-scan-security)
